description_long: This kiosk consists of three wooden service desks, each equipped with a computer monitor and keyboard, arranged in a row facing a blue partitioned enclosure. The enclosure is constructed from blue panels with transparent upper sections, supported by a metallic frame, and prominently features the Southwest.com branding and heart logo on multiple panels. The desks are positioned on a gray floor mat, separated from the enclosure by a small gap, suggesting a check-in or customer service function. The blue panels form a U-shaped barrier, providing a semi-private area behind the desks, likely for staff or equipment. The overall design is clean and functional, with a modern, corporate aesthetic. The signage and branding are highly visible, making the kiosk easily identifiable in a public or urban setting.
description: A modern kiosk with three wooden service desks and computers, set in front of a blue, branded partitioned enclosure with transparent upper panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing three wooden desks with computers facing a blue partitioned enclosure displaying Southwest.com branding.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the desks and the length of the blue enclosure panels with transparent tops.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the full expanse of the blue enclosure and the backs of the computer monitors on the desks.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the enclosure's structure and the alignment of the desks in front of it.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo on blue panels, with 'Southwest.com' text and heart symbol, placed on front and side panels of the enclosure.
attribute_window_presence: Transparent upper sections on all three enclosure panels, rectangular in shape.
attribute_door_configuration: None; open entryway between the desks and the enclosure.
attribute_roof_design: No roof; open-topped enclosure with flat, horizontal metallic frame.
